overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban downtown area. The player crosses a street, walks along a sidewalk past commercial buildings, enters a covered pedestrian underpass with red industrial lighting, and emerges into an open plaza. The scene features futuristic architecture, digital billboards, and various pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with neon signage

events.description: finishes crossing the street and steps onto the concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk at a neon-lit intersection, then proceeding along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black van driving through the intersection with headlights on
man in leather vest standing on the sidewalk corner

entered.detail: commercial building with illuminated red CONBATAKAS signage
broad yellow-striped pedestrian crossing with green directional arrows
large vertical screen displaying animated figure in red
tall modern street light pole with multiple fixtures

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a neon-lit urban intersection at night. The camera crosses a yellow crosswalk, passing a black van on the right, then steps onto the sidewalk. A large digital billboard displaying an animated figure dominates the view ahead, while the CONBATAKAS building stands prominently on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with commercial storefronts and palm trees

events.description: navigates around pedestrians while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past various pedestrians and street furniture

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking in the same direction ahead
woman wearing a blue hat walking toward the camera

entered.detail: illuminated yellow signage for MASALA STUDIOS on building facade
yellow and black striped construction barriers lining the sidewalk edge
tall palm tree in a circular concrete planter

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open city sidewalk lined with palm trees and construction barriers. The MASALA STUDIOS sign is visible on the left building, while the large digital billboard shifts to the right as the camera advances. Various pedestrians walk in both directions, and cars pass by on the street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass beneath elevated highway

events.description: enters the covered walkway beneath the overpass structure
ambient lighting shifts from blue neon to warm red artificial light

agents.ego_description: entering a covered pedestrian underpass, walking beneath large industrial ventilation fans

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket walking ahead into the covered area

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with exposed beams and industrial infrastructure
massive industrial exhaust fans mounted overhead in the ceiling
building facade painted deep red with industrial details

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions into a semi-covered pedestrian underpass beneath an elevated highway. Massive industrial ventilation fans are visible overhead as the lighting shifts to a warm red hue. The street barriers move to the left side as the camera proceeds deeper into the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed corridor with vending machines and closed storefronts

events.description: passing illuminated vending machines and debris piles along the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit covered corridor, passing vending machines and closed shops

notable_agents.action: person with red mohawk using an illuminated vending machine

entered.detail: brightly lit red and green vending machines with product displays
scattered cardboard boxes and trash accumulated against the wall
closed corrugated metal security shutters on shop fronts

segments.scene_description: Deep inside the enclosed pedestrian corridor, the ceiling feels lower and the space is lit by red neon strips. Vending machines glow brightly on the right side next to piles of debris and closed metal shutters. A person with a red mohawk stands at one of the vending machines as the camera continues forward toward the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza at exit of covered walkway with stairs

events.description: exits the covered underpass into the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: emerging from the covered walkway into a larger open plaza with visible stairs

entered.detail: street sign reading California Ave mounted on a pole
wide open pedestrian plaza with multiple levels visible
concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered corridor into a spacious open plaza. A street sign reading 'California Ave' is visible ahead, while a staircase leads upward on the right. The space opens up significantly with more ambient light, transitioning from the enclosed red-lit corridor to the broader urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bustling neon-lit intersection into a wide, commercial city corridor. It begins by crossing a yellow crosswalk past a black van, stepping onto a sidewalk dominated by a towering digital billboard and the prominent CONBATAKAS building. As the camera advances, the view shifts from the intersection toward an open pedestrian path lined with palm trees and construction barriers. The scene then expands as the camera passes the MASALA STUDIOS sign on the left, with the large digital billboard receding to the right while pedestrians and passing cars fill the surrounding urban space.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, red-lit industrial underpass into a wide, open urban plaza. It begins as the camera enters a semi-covered pedestrian walkway beneath an elevated highway, where massive ventilation fans loom overhead and the lighting shifts to a warm red hue. As the camera proceeds deeper into the enclosed corridor, the ceiling lowers and the space narrows, passing glowing vending machines, piles of debris, and a person with a red mohawk. The scene then expands as the camera reaches the distant exit, transitioning from the oppressive red neon strips back into the ambient light of the city. Finally, the environment opens up completely into a spacious plaza featuring a staircase and a street sign for California Ave.
